name: Incorrect Calculation of Multi-Byte String Length
description: The product incorrectly calculates the length of strings that contain multi-byte or wide characters, using byte count where character count is needed or vice versa, potentially leading to buffer overflows or truncated data.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[strlen|sizeof] calculates string length using byte-oriented functions on multi-byte/wide character strings (or wide-char functions on byte strings), producing an incorrect size used in STORAGE[buffer_alloc] or TRANSFORM[buffer_copy] without a CONTROL node that ensures the length function matches the string encoding
